# Preface {.unnumbered}

This book serves as the comprehensive documentation of **TC-m6A** research. This covers theoretical frameworks, experimental methodologies, and computational analyses, and more. By consolidating these materials, I provide a transparent and holistic view of the research investigated throughout this project, which may not be included in the official publication.  

Official publication regarding this work:
[bioRxiv](https://doi.org/10.64898/2026.03.19.713046)


# About the author {.unnumbered}

## Affiliation {.unnumbered}

<sup>1</sup> Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering, Swanson School of Engineering, University of Pittsburgh, Pittsburgh, PA, USA

<sup>2</sup> Cancer Virology Program, UPMC Hillman Cancer Center, University of Pittsburgh School of Medicine, Pittsburgh, PA, USA

## Contact {.unnumbered}

sumin.jo\@pitt.edu
